title: Matcher
description: A matcher defining a single matching criterion based on attributes, segments, or key values.

negate.description: Whether to negate the matcher result

attribute.description: The attribute name to match against. Required for attribute-based matchers.

strings.description: String values used by string-based matchers

number.description: Numeric value used by numeric matchers

date.description: Unix timestamp value used by date-based matchers

between.description: Range values for the BETWEEN matcher

depends.description: Dependency configuration for the DEPENDS_ON matcher

splitName.description: Name of the feature flag to depend on

treatments.description: Treatments that must be returned by the dependency
